headers.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), microphone=(), payment=(), usb=()
headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://func-bhaumik-notes.azurewebsites.net; media-src 'self'; frame-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
